# PERF-022 positive: os.ReadFile inside a handler
lang: go
file: PERF-022-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

func Banner(c *gin.Context) {
	b, err := os.ReadFile("/etc/banner.txt")
	if err != nil {
		c.AbortWithStatus(http.StatusInternalServerError)
		return
	}
	c.Data(http.StatusOK, "text/plain", b)
}
